categories.name: Starters
categories.description: Handmade in our kitchen. Served with your choice of chutney.

items.title: Samosa
items.text: Fried pastry filled with potatoes, peas, and cashews.

items.title: Samosa Chaat
items.text: Crumbled samosa with sweet yogurt, chutney, and crispy sev.

items.title: Onion Ring Pakoda
items.text: Onion rings in chickpea flour batter, fried golden.

items.title: Paneer Pakoda
items.text: Paneer cubes in spiced chickpea flour batter, fried crispy.

categories.name: Tandoor
categories.description: Marinated and baked in a traditional tandoor oven. Served with salad and your choice of chutney. Preparation approx. 25 min.

items.title: Chicken Tikka
items.text: Juicy chicken pieces in yogurt marinade with Indian spices.

items.title: Malai Tikka
items.text: Chicken in a creamy cashew and cream marinade, tender and mild.

items.title: Tikka Platter
items.text: A combination of classic Chicken Tikka and creamy Malai Tikka.

categories.name: Curry
categories.description: Each curry is served with basmati rice. Swap for Indian bread or Jeera Rice for an additional charge. Selected curries available vegan with tofu — ask staff.

items.title: Butter Masala
items.text: Creamy butter-tomato sauce with cashews, subtly sweet. Paneer 37 | Chicken 40 | Prawns 50 zł.

items.title: Korma
items.text: Silky cashew and cream sauce, rich and gently sweet. Paneer 39 | Chicken 42 | Prawns 52 zł.

items.title: Mango Curry
items.text: Velvety mango sauce with cashews and cream, fruity and sweet. Paneer 40 | Chicken 43 | Prawns 53 zł.

items.title: Tikka Masala
items.text: Onion-tomato sauce with cashews and cream. Paneer 36 | Chicken 39 | Lamb 45 | Prawns 48 zł.

items.title: Palak Curry
items.text: Spinach curry with garlic, ginger, cashews, and cream. Paneer 36 | Chicken 39 | Lamb 46 | Prawns 49 zł.

items.title: Jalfrezi
items.text: Bell pepper and tomato curry, lightly tangy with cashews and cream. Paneer 37 | Chicken 40 | Lamb 47 | Prawns 50 zł.

items.title: Methi Curry
items.text: Subtly nutty fenugreek sauce with cashews and cream. Paneer 37 | Chicken 40 | Lamb 46 | Prawns 50 zł.

items.title: Laal Maas
items.text: Traditional Rajasthani lamb curry slow-cooked with chili, yogurt, and spices.

items.title: Vindaloo
items.text: Fiery onion-tomato base with garlic, chili, cashews, and cream. Paneer 38 | Chicken 41 | Lamb 48 | Prawns 51 zł.

items.title: Mix Veg Kadai
items.text: Seasonal vegetables and paneer cooked in spiced tomato gravy.

categories.name: Bread & Rice
categories.description: Traditional Indian breads from the tandoor oven and aromatic rice dishes.

items.title: Basmati Rice
items.text: Fragrant long-grain basmati rice, included with all curries.

items.title: Jeera Rice
items.text: Basmati rice pan-fried in ghee with cumin. +5 zł upgrade from rice.

items.title: Plain Naan
items.text: Traditional wheat bread from the tandoor. Contains milk and egg.

items.title: Butter Naan
items.text: Tandoor bread with melted butter. +4 zł upgrade from rice.

items.title: Garlic Naan
items.text: Tandoor bread with garlic and butter. +6 zł upgrade from rice.

items.title: Honey & Butter Naan
items.text: Tandoor bread with butter and a touch of honey. +6 zł upgrade.

items.title: Kasturi Special Naan
items.text: Signature naan with garlic, butter, fenugreek, and black seed. +8 zł upgrade.

items.title: Roti
items.text: Wholegrain wheat flatbread. +2 zł upgrade from rice.

items.title: Butter Roti
items.text: Wholegrain flatbread with melted butter. +4 zł upgrade from rice.

items.title: Sooki Bhaji
items.text: Potatoes sautéed with turmeric, cumin, and Indian spices.

items.title: Indian-Style Cabbage
items.text: Cabbage stir-fried with bell pepper, mustard seeds, and Indian spices.

items.title: Sweet Potato Fries
items.text: Sweet potato fries served with a mild yogurt dip.

items.title: Crispy Chicken
items.text: Crispy fried chicken pieces served with yogurt dip.
